item.title: Meme-poster
item.dc:creator: trich0icDurst977

item.title: Captured Russian soldier calls his family: "don't believe the TV, we bomb civilians." Fight for freedom, Stand with Ukrainian. Share this to your Russian friends not to trust Putin and his lies.
item.description: Source: https://www.reddit.com/r/ukraine/comments/t4y6xe/captured_russian_soldiers_calling_home_to/ Translation I'm warm, I'm fed. I can tell you, everything we've been told is bullshit. Were sitting her now, myself and the guys who brought me, and I can say one thing, I have no idea what the fuck we were told all this stuff for. Here, they have asphalt roads even in the villages, with lighting, everywhere. Fuck, I - [incomprehensible over the phone] - everything they are telling us on TV is bullshit, I am here myself right now, and I know what it's like, I'm telling you [phone chatter] In Kharkiv our own army is bombing the city, not the Ukrainians, our own army, they are walking through the streets [and bombing]. Just so you understand, we've been brought here and tossed out like fucking pigs -
item.dc:creator: SavingHongKong

item.title: This was the line to a Ukrainian owned Cheesecake shop in San Antonio that was donating 100% of their profits during a weekend promotion. They managed to raise $72,000 USD for the Ukrainian military.

item.title: Most important sound you'll hear today
item.description: So yeah. Sound ON also, Trying to earn some small money for food, kinda desperate for anything I am looking for survey sites, only legit things I can think of is Mechanical Turk and Fiverr, please let me know if you have any other suggestions I would prefer if it pays in pay pal I dont mind if it pays very little, just need anything right now Waiting for a job to start and times been tough Also sending love and strength to the people of Ukraine, I wish I could help Screw putin
item.dc:creator: kallekuttu

item.title: If you like vampire movies, you might want to give these a try :)
item.description:
Only Lovers Left Alive Great movie. Great story. Great music. I loved this vampire tale. Made me laugh, made me think and and made me cringe. Excellently directed and excellent score. Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qWRlq__5iRo
Let the Right One In Probably my favorite vampire movie. The movie is a sad story with excellent directing and beautiful yet dark undertones. Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZonUW_acsOg
What We Do In The Shadows Hilarious. A great comedy of roommates who are vampires coping with everyday life. A must see! Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HUPhDTG70f8
Thirst One of the best stories I have seen in a vampire move. It is a long one but worth it. Very deep and dark with brooding elements. Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ODoagpV68gA
Dracula: Dead and Loving It Classic. Mel Brooks and Leslie are amazing in this comedy vampire flick. A must see if you are into the slapstick humor. Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tVdn8JH91Dg
The Lost Boys After moving to a new town, two brothers are convinced that the area is frequented by vampires. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zDQ0_lXClxc
30 Days of Night Though one of the larger marketed films, I still found it quite intriguing and creepy. Great depiction of the vampires! Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fOFsXrEc8Oc
Byzantium Mother and daughter vampires move to a home to try and cope with their vampness. Pretty darn good in all aspects. Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Dj1yxdhJNqA
A Girl Walks Home Alone At Night Never seen a vampire movie like this one. Very arthouse (which I like). Excellent cinematography and music. A must see if you are tired of the usual vampire flick. Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9PLm4ecu25o
Nosferatu Nothing need be said about this one. Classic
item.dc:creator: ZUXUX

item.title: Seen in Rincon, GA, USA.
item.description: Living in Georgia, I don't often see too many things that make feel proud to live here. Cheers to whoever paid to put that up. FP edit: That went up fast! Please donate blood or give to red cross. They're low pretty much everywhere. Send butts if you want ;)
item.dc:creator: Algebraicrhombus

item.title: Unauthorized pelvic exams are being performed on anesthetized women
item.description: https://www.nytimes.com/2020/02/17/health/pelvic-medical-exam-unconscious.html Non-paywall: https://web.archive.org/web/20200217125202/https://www.nytimes.com/2020/02/17/health/pelvic-medical-exam-unconscious.html I read this article today, and I can't stop thinking about it. If you have time, read some of the comments, too. It's truly shocking. If this ever happened to me, I would absolutely be traumatized, and I think most women would feel the same way. Here's another article I found: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6882529/
item.dc:creator: spunkynuggets

item.title: Day 278: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Supreme Pizza Burger 8oz Beef Patty Topped With Grilled Pepperoni, Fresh Melted Mozzarella, Grilled Onions, Bell Peppers, Mushrooms And Mom's Marinara On A Sourdough Bun From Our Mom's Restaurant & Bar In Hammond And Baton Rouge, LA Previous Day 277: https://imgur.com/gallery/45k3waR MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD
